comments.comment:
THE SOURCE OF ASBESTOS IS THE OLD INSULATION REMOVED FROM THE EQUIPMENT AND ì
IS A FUNCTION OF MAINTENANCE ACTIVITY.

THIS WAS SURPLUS MATERIAL LEFT OVER FROM A DISCONTINUED PROCESS. WE WERE ì
UNABLE TO FIND ANY RECYCLER WHO WOULD ACCEPT IT.
